item.title: EDX Markets Closes $76M Series C Led by SBI Holdings
item.description: EDX Markets, an institutional-only crypto trading venue with its own central clearinghouse, closed a $76 million Series C funding round led by SBI Holdings, the firm said in a press release. The Tokyo-listed financial group becomes a strategic investor in the U.S. exchange. The capital will fund…

item.title: Green Shoots Bitcoin's bottom is still building, but its character is shifting. Long-term holder capitulation is cooling, buyers absorbed the June lows, and price is climbing back toward the levels th
item.description: pGreen Shootsbr /br /Bitcoin's bottom is still building, but its character is shifting. Long-term holder capitulation is cooling, buyers absorbed the June lows, and price is climbing back toward the levels that capped itbr /br /Read the full Week On-Chain👇br /a href="https://glassno.de/4wczXsw"glass

item.title: Ostium Halts Trading After Oracle Exploit Drains up to $18M from Vault
item.description: Blockaid says an attacker used a registered price-feed forwarder and future-dated oracle reports to book fake trading profits, in the latest exploit to target the automated infrastructure DeFi protocols lean on for pricing.

item.title: JTX is building for today's active traders. Solana isn't short on ways to trade, but it has lacked a home for the retail cohort that wants a pro UX with advanced orders and superior execution across a
item.description: pJTX is building for today's active traders.br /br /Solana isn't short on ways to trade, but it has lacked a home for the retail cohort that wants a pro UX with advanced orders and superior execution across any asset. Many have left for other platforms, and a href="https://nitter.net/jtx_trade" titl

item.title: July 15 Update: #Bitcoin ETFs: 1D NetFlow: +2,648 $BTC(+$172.34M)🟢 7D NetFlow: -5,716 $BTC(-$372.04M)🔴 #Ethereum ETFs: 1D NetFlow: +31,277 $ETH(+$60.08M)🟢 7D NetFlow: +45,185 $ETH(+$86.8M)🟢

item.title: DTCC Starts Live Tokenized-Securities Trades With More Than Two Dozen Firms
item.description: The company that settles most US stock trades is running its first production trades of tokenized real-world assets, with a full service launch set for October.

item.title: Stripe's $53B PayPal Bid Would Combine Bridge and PYUSD Under One Owner
item.description: The unsolicited offer from Stripe and Advent International, if PayPal accepts, would consolidate two of the mainstream payments industry's stablecoin operations.

item.title: As $CASHCAT kept falling, this guy capitulated after just one day. He sold all 6.12M $CASHCAT for 383.6 $ETH($735K), taking a loss of 135 $ETH($259K).
item.description: pAs a href="https://nitter.net/search?f=tweets&amp;q=%23CASHCAT"$CASHCAT/a kept falling, this guy capitulated after just one day.br /br /He sold all 6.12M a href="https://nitter.net/search?f=tweets&amp;q=%23CASHCAT"$CASHCAT/a for 383.6 a href="https://nitter.net/search?f=tweets&amp;q=%23ETH"$ETH/a($

item.title: Le Japon réforme la fiscalité des actifs numériques : vers une flat tax à 20 % https://bitcoin.fr/le-japon-reforme-la-fiscalite-des-actifs-numeriques/

item.title: R to @l2beat: It's been two weeks since @Lighter_xyz perps launched in @RobinhoodApp Wallet - a big step toward bringing onchain perps to a mainstream audience, and the deployment already secures ~$6.
item.description: pIt's been two weeks since a href="https://nitter.net/Lighter_xyz" title="Lighter"@Lighter_xyz/a perps launched in a href="https://nitter.net/RobinhoodApp" title="Robinhood"@RobinhoodApp/a Wallet - a big step toward bringing onchain perps to a mainstream audience, and the deployment already secures

item.title: R to @l2beat: One more inherited risk: Robinhood Chain runs ArbOS transaction filtering, so an authorized filterer can make even force-included transactions fail. There is no guaranteed mechanism to g
item.description: pOne more inherited risk: Robinhood Chain runs ArbOS transaction filtering, so an authorized filterer can make even force-included transactions fail. There is no guaranteed mechanism to get a transaction included./p

item.title: R to @l2beat: Unlike the Ethereum deployment, this fork posts state diffs directly in calldata on Robinhood Chain, Robinhood Chain then batches its own data to Ethereum blobs.
item.description: pUnlike the Ethereum deployment, this fork posts state diffs directly in calldata on Robinhood Chain, Robinhood Chain then batches its own data to Ethereum blobs./p

item.title: R to @l2beat: Upgrades route through an UpgradeGatekeeper with a 21-day delay, but a Security Council EOA can cut that delay to zero at any time.
item.description: pUpgrades route through an UpgradeGatekeeper with a 21-day delay, but a Security Council EOA can cut that delay to zero at any time./pimg src="https://nitter.net/pic/media%2FHNQ7fqeWUAAfJN6.jpg" /

item.title: R to @l2beat: Now, the escape hatch. If operators leave the oldest priority request unprocessed for 14 days, anyone can activate "desert mode". Users are then expected to exit by proving their balance
item.description: pNow, the escape hatch. If operators leave the oldest priority request unprocessed for 14 days, anyone can activate "desert mode". Users are then expected to exit by proving their balances against the last verified state root.br /br /Except the deployed DesertVerifier doesn't verify anything. It acc

item.title: R to @l2beat: The new deployment currently isn't classified as a rollup, it sits in the Others section, together with its host chain. Robinhood Chain doesn't satisfy the requirement of having at least
item.description: pThe new deployment currently isn't classified as a rollup, it sits in the Others section, together with its host chain. br /br /Robinhood Chain doesn't satisfy the requirement of having at least 5 external actors that can submit challenges: it validates state with fraud proofs open to just 2 whitel

item.description: pBitmine Generated $45.7M from ETH Staking Last Quarter, 98% of Revenuebr /br /According to Bitmine’s latest 10-Q filing, Bitmine Immersion Technologies generated $45.7 million in Ethereum staking and validation revenue for the quarter ended May 31, accounting for 98% of total revenue. item.title: According to SoSoValue data, spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded $181 million in net inflows yesterday (July 14, ET). Spot Ethereum ETFs saw $58.3385 million in net inflows, with none of the 10 ETFs recording
item.description: pAccording to SoSoValue data, spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded $181 million in net inflows yesterday (July 14, ET). Spot Ethereum ETFs saw $58.3385 million in net inflows, with none of the 10 ETFs recording net outflows./pimg src="https://nitter.net/pic/media%2FHNQOBSkbIAAUJI0.jpg" /

item.description: pInteractive Brokers, the Fourth-Largest U.S. Brokerage, Adds Nine Crypto Tokens and Two-Way Stablecoin Transfersbr /br /Interactive Brokers has added trading support for nine tokens through zerohash: AAVE, APT, CC, LDO, MON, NEAR, XPL, PAXG and UNI. item.title: Atharv explains why STRC demand matters for Strategy’s BTC buying. “If there is no demand for STRC in the market right now, then Saylor currently has no way of accretive Bitcoin purchases."
